text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem ACCESSEventTypeCS

This case-sensitive code system https://dsacms.github.io/cmmi-access-model/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
participant-lock-ending Participant Lock-In Period EndingThe 3-month participant lock-in period is ending soon, allowing the patient to switch to a different participant if desired.
control-group-ending Control Group Period EndingThe 12-month control group assignment period is ending soon, allowing the patient to be reconsidered for alignment in the ACCESS Model.
alignment-renewal Alignment Renewal DueThe initial alignment period is ending and renewal action is required to continue services under the ACCESS Model.
baseline-reporting-window Baseline Reporting DueThe baseline data report is due soon. If baseline reporting is not received within 60 days of alignment, the patient will be unaligned.
quarterly-reporting-window Quarterly Reporting DueThe quarterly data report is due soon. Quarterly reporting must be submitted 70 to 110 days after the prior data submission.
eoy-reporting-window End-of-Year Reporting DueThe end-of-year data report is due soon. End-of-year reporting must be submitted no later than 425 days from the date of alignment (365 days plus an additional 60 days).
unalignment Unalignment NoticeThe patient has been unaligned from the ACCESS Model due to a change in eligibility status.

name: ACCESSEventTypeCS
title: ACCESS Event Types
description: This codesystem defines codes for the types of events that trigger subscription notifications in the ACCESS Model.
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).

concept.definition: The 3-month participant lock-in period is ending soon, allowing the patient to switch to a different participant if desired.
The 12-month control group assignment period is ending soon, allowing the patient to be reconsidered for alignment in the ACCESS Model.
The initial alignment period is ending and renewal action is required to continue services under the ACCESS Model.
The baseline data report is due soon. If baseline reporting is not received within 60 days of alignment, the patient will be unaligned.
The quarterly data report is due soon. Quarterly reporting must be submitted 70 to 110 days after the prior data submission.
The end-of-year data report is due soon. End-of-year reporting must be submitted no later than 425 days from the date of alignment (365 days plus an additional 60 days).
The patient has been unaligned from the ACCESS Model due to a change in eligibility status.
